Services
Tax-Efficient Strategies Minimize taxes with smart withdrawal sequencing. Portfolio Management Diversified portfolios aligned with your timeline. Retirement Money Map A clear plan for every dollar in retirement. 401(k) & IRA Rollovers Consolidate accounts and optimize your strategy. Social Security Optimization Time your benefits to maximize lifetime income. Estate & Legacy Planning Protect your family and pass wealth efficiently.

Retire with confidence.
Not confusion.

GET STARTED → SEE WHY ▶

Capital Wealth helps you navigate retirement income, tax strategy, and federal benefits — with a dedicated fiduciary advisor and a personalized plan.

Assets Under Guidance $500M+
Families Served 500+
Years Fiduciary 15+

Retirement planning built around five fundamentals

Cash reserves that let you sleep at night →

Emergency reserves and liquid assets positioned so market volatility never threatens your daily life.

 Income streams that replace your paycheck →

Social Security optimization, pension maximization, and annuity strategies that deliver dependable monthly income.

 Portfolio growth that outpaces inflation →

Actively managed, diversified investments designed to grow your wealth through and beyond retirement.

 Tax strategies that keep more in your pocket →

Roth conversions, bracket management, and income planning to minimize your lifetime tax burden.

 Legacy planning so your wealth outlasts you →

Estate strategies, beneficiary optimization, and wealth transfer that protects the next generation.

Comprehensive Retirement Planning

Tailored to your unique situation and goals.

Schedule a Free Review

who we are

Here for Our
Neighbors

We do things differently because we see financial planning differently. We're proud to call Utah, Idaho and beyond home, and we love helping families in our communities create strategies that reflect what matters most.

Here, you're not just another client. You're part of a neighborhood.

Meet the Team

in the

Media

Discover the Keys to a Secure, Fulfilling Future

Get straight talk from experts with real guidance you can use. Whether you tune in to Capital Wealth Radio on KSL, KNRS, or Newstalk, you'll access practical advice to help you make smarter financial decisions.

Where Are You
on Your Journey?

$750K Saved

Thinking About Retirement

Age 58, looking to retire at 62. We created a tax-efficient drawdown strategy that extends their savings by 8 years.

View Case Studies
$1.2M Portfolio

Retirement Ready

Age 65, ready to retire. Social Security optimization and Medicare planning saved them $180K over the course of retirement.

Social Security Medicare
$2.1M Legacy

Already Retired

Age 70, retired 5 years. Estate planning and tax management preserved 40% more wealth for their heirs.

our process

Your Personalized
Financial Blueprint

1

Organize

We gather all your financial information and assess your current situation, uncovering opportunities you may have missed.

2

Plan

Create a comprehensive strategy tailored to your retirement goals, tax situation, and timeline for financial independence.

3

Implement

Execute the plan with ongoing monitoring and adjustments as life evolves. We stay by your side through every chapter.

Learn About Our Process
Client Stories

Real Families. Real Results.

"Really expanded our view on what retirement can look like."
"I finally have financial understanding and peace of mind."
"They've done great things for us."
"Saved us over $142,000 in taxes."
"We finally have a plan that makes sense for our family."
★★★★★
"Mike and his team are excellent. Their professionalism is amazing and we know his team really cares about us. They have presented a very comprehensive plan that has really expanded our view on what retirement can and will look like."
Kathy W.
Retired Educator
★★★★★
"Capital Wealth has been wonderful to work with. Everyone there is very friendly. Brent has gone out of his way to help me get my retirement in order. I recommend them to everyone I talk to."
Julie E.
Retirement Planning Client
★★★★★
"This is a great company to work with. We've trusted them with our accounts for two years now and they've done great things for us! They are also very personable and pleasant to work with."
Cory M.
Business Owner
★★★★★
"They saved us over $142,000 in taxes over the first five years of retirement. I had no idea we were leaving that much on the table. Capital Wealth changed our entire outlook."
Collette D.
Tax Savings Client
★★★★★
"As a federal employee, I had no idea how complex my benefits were until Capital Wealth walked us through everything — FERS, TSP, survivor benefits, all of it. We finally have a plan that makes sense for our family."
Christina L.
GS-14, Department of Defense

our commitment

We are legally obligated to act in YOUR best interest

As fiduciary advisors, we put your interests first, always. No conflicts, no hidden commissions, just honest advice.

specialized planning

FERS, TSP, FEGLI, FEHB, and more. We understand the unique benefits and challenges of federal employment.
